label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out what upset Melanie during the National Championships. Looking at the text: Melanie entered the National Championships but didn't do well. She had the second fastest swim and fastest run but came nowhere. Then she says, "I was following this man and suddenly we came to the sea. We realised then that we had gone wrong. I ended up cycling 20 kilometres too far." So she made a mistake in the race, probably a wrong turn, leading her to cycle extra distance. She cried during the running part because of that. The options are A to D. The question is asking what upset her. The key here is that she made a mistake during the race—specifically, she went the wrong way and cycled too far. That's option C. Option A is about being tricked by another competitor, but there's no mention of trickery. Option B is about letting teammates down, but she was in a competition where she was following
